questions.question: A circuit is a closed path in a graph. If a graph has a circuit of length 6 and the sum of the degrees of all vertices is 28, what is the number of edges in the circuit?
Consider a simple graph G with a circuit of length 5. If the graph has 5 vertices, what is the minimum number of edges that G must have?
questions.hint: Think about the properties of Eulerian graphs

questions.question: In a simple graph, a circuit of length n can be formed by n distinct vertices. What is the minimum number of edges required to form a circuit of length n?
questions.hint: Think about the properties of simple graphs
